sense.definition: furniture we use to sleep on that normally has a frame and mattress

examples.x: I have a bedside table next to my bed for my books and glasses.
I love to sleep on my own comfortable bed.
I make my bed every morning to keep it tidy.
I read a book before going to bed.
The bed in the hotel room was king-sized.

sense.definition: a bed that can be folded up and stored vertically against a wall or inside a closet or cabinet to save space when not in use

examples.x: In the tiny studio apartment, the murphy bed folds up neatly into the wall during the day to create more living space.
We installed a murphy bed in the guest room to make it more functional for visitors and free up space when it's not in use.
My cousin’s apartment is small, so she uses a murphy bed to make her living area more spacious.
The new design of the murphy bed includes built-in shelves, so it doubles as both a sleeping space and storage area.

sense.definition: a type of bed that has a solid, flat, and raised platform on which the mattress rests, eliminating the need for a box spring or other foundation

examples.x: The platform bed’s sleek design made the small bedroom feel more spacious.
He decided to buy a platform bed because it did not require a box spring.
The platform bed is perfect for people who prefer a minimalist style.
She chose a platform bed with wooden slats for a more natural look.
The platform bed’s simple structure makes it easy to assemble and move.

sense.definition: a style of bed that features a curved or scrolled foot and headboard resembling a sleigh or a sled

examples.x: After years of use, the sleigh bed still looked brand new thanks to its sturdy construction.
The sleigh bed’s curved design gave the room a warm, classic feel.
He spent hours searching for the perfect sleigh bed to match the vintage furniture in his home.
She chose a sleigh bed for her guest room to create a cozy, inviting atmosphere.

sense.definition: a type of bed that has vertical columns or posts at each corner, often with a canopy or drapes hung from the top

examples.x: The four-poster bed in the guest room was decorated with flowing white curtains.
She spent the night in a cozy four-poster bed, tucked under the soft, velvet canopy.
The antique four-poster bed added a touch of elegance to the room’s vintage decor.
They stayed in a charming inn, where each room had a beautiful four-poster bed.

sense.definition: a bed with a base that can be moved to different positions for added comfort and support

examples.x: The adjustable bed allowed her to raise the headrest for a more comfortable reading position.
He bought an adjustable bed to help with his back pain while sleeping.
The hospital room had an adjustable bed to make it easier for the patient to sit up.
She enjoys her adjustable bed because it helps her sleep better when her legs are elevated.
The adjustable bed features a remote control to change its position with ease.

sense.definition: a piece of furniture consisting of two small beds with one built above the other

examples.x: The children were excited to sleep in the new bunk bed in their shared room.
They bought a new bunk bed with a desk underneath for more space.
We built a bunk bed in the cabin to make the most of the limited space.
The bunk bed had a sturdy ladder for easy access to the upper bed.
The hostel room was equipped with several bunk beds to accommodate many guests.

sense.definition: a type of bed that is elevated above the ground, allowing for extra space underneath which can be utilized for storage or as a functional area

examples.x: The loft bed in my small apartment gives me extra space to set up a work desk underneath.
She bought a loft bed for her son’s room to create more play space on the floor.
The loft bed has become popular in college dorms where space is limited.
We installed a loft bed to make room for a cozy reading nook under it.

sense.definition: a bed that is stored underneath another bed and can be pulled out when needed for extra sleeping space

examples.x: She pulled out the trundle bed when her friend stayed over for the weekend.
The trundle bed was perfect for our small apartment, as it provided an extra bed without crowding the room.
After the sleepover, I pushed the trundle bed back under the main bed to save space.
The trundle bed was hidden under the main bed, ready to be pulled out whenever we had company.
The kids loved the trundle bed because it gave them extra space to play during the day.

sense.definition: a type of bed that features built-in storage compartments or drawers underneath the mattress to provide extra space for storing clothes, linens, or other items

examples.x: She loves her new storage bed because it helps organize her small apartment.
With its built-in drawers, the storage bed offers a great way to store clothes and shoes.
The kids’ room has a storage bed that holds all their toys, making the room look tidy.
He bought a storage bed for his studio apartment to make the most of limited space.
They chose a storage bed for their master bedroom to keep seasonal clothes tucked away.

sense.definition: a type of platform bed that typically features built-in storage drawers underneath the mattress and a headboard with shelves or cabinets for storing clothing, linens, or other items
a type of bed that features a headboard and footboard made up of flat panels or slats of wood or other materials, typically framed with rails and posts

examples.x: The panel bed in the guest room was crafted from rich oak, adding a touch of warmth to the space.
I decided to go with a panel bed for my new apartment because of its timeless, elegant design.
He replaced his old bed with a modern panel bed, which gave the room a more sophisticated feel.
The panel bed had intricate carvings along the headboard, making it the focal point of the room.
I found a beautiful panel bed at the furniture store that perfectly matched the decor of my bedroom.

sense.definition: a type of upholstered bed that features a headboard that extend upward and outward from the head of the bed, often resembling the shape of a high-back chair, providing a cozy and comfortable feel

examples.x: The wingback bed added a touch of elegance to the bedroom with its high, upholstered sides.
She loved the cozy feel of the wingback bed, which made the room feel more intimate.
He chose a wingback bed with soft fabric to complement the vintage style of the room.
The high sides of the wingback bed made it feel like a personal retreat within the room.
She sank into the comfort of the wingback bed, its wings providing a sense of security.

sense.definition: a type of bed that features a padded headboard, footboard, and sometimes side rails that are covered in fabric or leather, providing a soft and comfortable surface to lean against while sitting up in bed

examples.x: I love how the upholstered bed creates a relaxed, inviting atmosphere in the room.
The upholstered bed's soft headboard was ideal for reading in bed on lazy weekends.
The room felt cozier after we added an upholstered bed with a soft, velvet headboard.
She chose an upholstered bed in a light gray fabric to match the modern decor of her bedroom.
The upholstered bed was perfect for the guest room, offering both comfort and style.

sense.definition: a small bed or bassinet designed for infants and young babies, typically made of wood or wicker, and equipped with rockers or gliders to help soothe and lull the baby to sleep
a spacious bed for two people, providing more room than a full-sized bed but smaller than a king-sized bed

a type of bed that measures approximately 76 inches wide and 80 inches long, providing more sleeping space than a queen-size bed and ideal for couples who want more space to stretch out while sleeping

examples.x: The couple decided to upgrade to a king-size bed for more space and comfort.
The king-size bed took up most of the room, leaving little space for furniture.
After staying in a hotel with a king-size bed, she knew she wanted one at home.
A king-size bed is great for families with young children who sometimes sleep together.

sense.definition: a type of bed that uses water-filled chambers as its primary support system, providing a unique, floating sensation and can be heated for warmth

examples.x: He loves the feel of his waterbed, especially when the temperature is set just right.

sense.definition: one of a pair of single beds in a hotel or guest room for two people

examples.x: Her dorm room was small, with just enough space for twin beds and a desk.
The beach cottage they rented for the summer had a room with twin beds.
The guest room has twin beds, perfect for when his friends come to visit.
The host had arranged the twin beds neatly before their arrival.
The twin beds were covered with colorful linens, adding a cheerful touch to the room.

sense.definition: a bed that is big enough for two people to sleep in

examples.x: They decided to buy a double bed for their guest room to accommodate visitors comfortably.
The double bed in the master bedroom is perfect for the couple.
After moving into the new apartment, she realized the double bed fit perfectly in her small bedroom.
They found a stylish double bed frame that matched the room's decor.
He wanted a bigger bed, so they replaced their double bed with a king-size one.

sense.definition: a small bed for infants and young babies with slatted sides to keep them safely contained and often with an adjustable mattress height, which can be converted into a toddler bed as the child grows
a decorative type of bed that was popular during the Victorian era, often featuring ornate designs with curved metalwork and intricate carvings on the headboard and footboard
a type of bed frame made primarily of iron or wrought iron, often featuring decorative accents and intricate designs on the headboard, footboard, and rails

examples.x: The vintage iron bed added a touch of elegance to the guest room.
She loved the delicate details on the iron bed’s headboard.
The sturdy iron bed frame lasted for years without showing signs of wear.
They decided to buy a black iron bed to match the room's industrial style.
The iron bed was both stylish and practical, fitting perfectly in the small apartment.

sense.definition: a bed frame made of brass or brass-plated metal, often with decorative accents or intricate designs, popular in the 19th and early 20th centuries and still available in various styles today

examples.x: The brass bed in the guest room added a touch of elegance to the space.
After a long day, she sank into the soft mattress of her brass bed, feeling instantly relaxed.
He chose a brass bed for its timeless look, which complemented the traditional design of the room.
The brass bed was a perfect fit for the vintage-inspired bedroom she had designed.

sense.definition: a small, portable bed designed for newborn infants and typically used for the first few months of a baby's life
